transcript: Speaker A: I've been doing this for 2 years. Pretending my mic is broken or my internet died or my kid is crying. I never spoke up until I tried Loora. Look, let me show you. Speaker B: What are you doing? Speaker A: I am working. I have many work today. Speaker B: Do you mean: 'I have a lot of work today'? Speaker A: Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working. Speaker B: Do you mean: 'my brain isn't working'? Speaker A: Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working. Speaker B: That's perfect! Well done, Anna! Speaker A: I want to speak in English everyday but lesson is expensive! Speaker B: Why don't you speak to an AI tutor? Speaker A: I'm not sure about an AI tutor. I want someone who can help correct my mistakes. Speaker B: Like I did! My name is Loora and I am an AI tutor! Nice to meet you, Anna! Speaker A: You're an AI tutor? What? No way! Speaker B: Download the Loora app and talk to me everyday and I'll help correct your mistakes! Speaker A: Amazing. I'll add it to my daily routine today!

summary: A woman demonstrates how she uses the Loora app to practice English. The AI tutor corrects her grammar mistakes in real-time during a simulated conversation. The ad promotes Loora as an affordable, interactive way to improve English speaking skills daily.
